caption: The video shows a person crafting a birthday card on a grid-lined cutting mat. The card features a camouflage-patterned background with a white tag that reads, "Hoping your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things." The person is carefully attaching a small white bow to the top of the tag using their hands. Various crafting supplies, including additional patterned paper strips, a stamping tool, and other materials, are visible around the workspace, indicating a detailed and creative card-making process. The focus remains on the precise placement and adjustment of the bow to ensure it looks neat and well-attached to the card.
